prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 77 名（2026 年），近年稳定在 72–81 名区间，属中上游 211；2024 年声誉偏负面（校园安全事件），2025–2026 年无福州大学专项声誉记录；抖音综合热度排名第 88 位，评价「一般」，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中化学获评 A-，为该校唯一 A- 及以上学科；化学工程与工艺、材料等相关专业与优势学科关联，但该校在云南招生的工科主力专业（电气、机械、电子、软件等）未直接对应 A 类学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信为 2024–2025 年高热推荐专业，计算机类持续推荐，与福州大学在云南招生的电气、电子、软件等工科专业高度匹配，热门专业吸引力对位次有支撑；云南省 2026 年高考总人数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年（约 28.57 万）大幅增长约 32%，物理类考生估算约 22.94 万，考生规模显著扩大，竞争压力上升；福州大学位于福建省，在云南省招生计划近年稳定在 66–74 人，2026 年计划 70 人，未出现大幅调整。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次 2025 年基准约 28007 名、2026 年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生大幅增加约 32% 以及电气/电子信息等热门专业对报考的支撑作用，预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年略有加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约 28257 名，区间 27757–28757 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 27757–28757 名内，建议以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。一档的智能电网、电子、软件等专业位次需求较高（约 6790–8700 名），远优于预测区间，实际录取难度极大，仅位次明显优于区间上限时可尝试；二档的机械、数学等专业位次约 8153–11160 名，同样高于预测区间，但差距相对较小；三档的土木、给排水、建筑学及闽台合作专业位次约 11493–28007 名，与预测区间较为接近，是稳妥选择。闽台合作专业学费较高（15000 元/年），需结合家庭经济条件考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 37781→27974→27716→25473→28007. In 2021, the ranking was lowered to 37781 due to Fujian-Taiwan cooperation/geology and mining programs. From 2022 to 2024, the overall ranking moved forward (competition eased), and in 2025 it rebounded to about 28007. Over the past 3 years, the fluctuation range was approximately 25473–28007, with the 2025 baseline around 28007. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 66 in 2021, 68 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 74 in 2024, and 70 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 70, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, national double first-class construction university; ranked approximately 77th on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), stable in the 72–81 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2024, reputation was slightly negative (campus safety incident), with no specific reputation records for Fuzhou University in 2025–2026. TikTok comprehensive popularity ranking is 88th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no significant signs of increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Chemical engineering and technology, materials, and related majors are associated with advantageous disciplines, but the main engineering majors recruited in Yunnan (electrical, mechanical, electronics, software, etc.) do not directly correspond to A-class disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical engineering and automation, electronic information/communication were highly recommended majors in 2024–2025, and computer science continues to be recommended. These align well with the engineering majors (electrical, electronics, software, etc.) recruited by Fuzhou University in Yunnan, supporting the ranking with the appeal of popular majors. The total number of Yunnan Province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 285,700). The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 229,400, with a notable expansion in candidate scale, increasing competition pressure. Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, with a stable enrollment plan in Yunnan Province in recent years (66–74), and the 2026 plan is 70, with no major adjustments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the historical ranking baseline of approximately 28007 in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a significant increase of about 32% in local physics category examinees, and the supporting effect of popular majors like electrical/electronic information on applications, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with the ranking shifting slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 28257, with a range of 27757–28757.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 27757–28757, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. Tier 1 majors such as Smart Grid, Electronics, and Software have higher ranking requirements (approximately 6790–8700), far above the predicted range, making actual admission extremely difficult; only attempt if your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range. Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical and Mathematics have rankings around 8153–11160, also above the predicted range, but the gap is relatively smaller. Tier 3 majors such as Civil Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage, Architecture, and Fujian-Taiwan cooperation programs have rankings around 11493–28007, which are closer to the predicted range and are safe choices. Fujian-Taiwan cooperation programs have higher tuition fees (15,000 yuan/year), so family financial conditions should be considered.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1815→1832→2083→2352→2915, showing a continuous decline for 5 consecutive years (increased competition). The provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 12 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 12, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion to alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, national Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 77th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2024, its reputation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), with no specific reputation records for Fuzhou University in 2025–2026. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese was rated as 'recommended' in 2023–2024, suitable for civil service exams and public institution exams. Finance/Finance/Economics was rated as 'divergent and wait-and-see' in 2024, with higher requirements for university level. English/Foreign Languages was rated as 'generally wait-and-see' in 2024. The total number of Yunnan Province college entrance exam takers in 2026 is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (approximately 285,700). The estimated number of history category examinees is about 148,500, with a notable expansion in candidate scale and increased competition pressure. Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, and its liberal arts enrollment plan in Yunnan has been stable at 10–12 in recent years, with the 2026 plan at 12, showing no major adjustments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings over the past 5 years, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 32% in local history category examinees, and the lack of A-class discipline support for liberal arts majors, it is expected that competition in 2026 will intensify further compared to 2025, with rankings continuing to decline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3065, with a range of 2565–3565.
